title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Kgalagadi District Council (noise and Nuisance Control) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Kgalagadi District Council (noise and Nuisance Control) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-laws may be cited as the Kgalagadi District Council (Noise and Nuisance Control) Bye-laws.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Nuisance prohibited
Restriction on operating sound systems
provisions.content:
4. Restriction on operating sound systems
A person shall not
( a ) operate, cause or permit to be operated any musical instrument to the annoyance of the inhabitants of any premises in the neighbourhood; or
( b ) operate, cause or permit use of any musical instrument for the purpose of advertising in public,

definitions.definition: a written communication to a violator requiring the stoppage of a nuisance with immediate effect or placing restrictions on when and how long an activity can occur or place other restrictions as necessary
material that is obscene and harmful to existing social norms or annoying to other people
an area designated by the Council as an area where the issue of a noise licence is likely to cause disturbance or nuisance to the premises in the neighbourhood
a wireless radio, loudspeaker, record player, amplifier or any similar device
any disturbance that materially interferes with another person's enjoyment of his or her own home or habitation.
